name: project-tracker
description: Project documentation lifecycle: init tracker docs, learn from them, audit progress, validate health, update on changes, and record architectural decisions

interface.longDescription: Generate, read, audit, validate, update, and extend structured tracker documentation for a codebase.
defaultPrompt: Use Project Tracker to initialize tracker docs for this repository.
Use Project Tracker to learn this project from existing tracker docs.
Use Project Tracker to validate whether tracker docs match the current code.
Use Project Tracker to update stale tracker docs after code changes.
Use Project Tracker to audit progress and find untracked TODOs.
Use Project Tracker to record an architectural decision.
